task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'My Portfolio' section in the JStock application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock application window is visible with the 'My Portfolio' tab or view active.

task_completion.description: Record a dividend transaction for AAPL with an amount of $96.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dividend entry is visible in the AAPL transaction history or dividend dialog showing an amount of 96.00.

task_completion.description: Set the date of the AAPL dividend transaction to March 15, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date 'Mar 15, 2024' (or equivalent format like 03/15/2024) is visible for the $96.00 AAPL dividend entry.

task_completion.description: Record a buy transaction for AAPL with 0.55 units at a price of $174.55.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A buy entry is visible in the AAPL transaction history showing 0.55 shares/units and a price of 174.55.

task_completion.description: Set the date of the AAPL buy transaction to March 15, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date 'Mar 15, 2024' (or equivalent format) is visible for the 0.55 unit AAPL buy entry.

task_completion.description: Include the comment 'DRIP reinvestment' on the AAPL buy transaction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'DRIP reinvestment' (or at least 'DRIP') is visible in the comment, notes, or remarks field associated with the 0.55 unit buy transaction.

integrity.description: The agent used the JStock graphical user interface to enter the transactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show JStock dialog boxes (e.g., 'Buy', 'Dividend') being filled out, rather than terminal commands modifying a database directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual JStock application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard JStock application window and menus are visible, not a text editor, mock interface, or script file.

integrity.description: Existing portfolio holdings were not modified or deleted.
integrity.visual_evidence: Pre-existing holdings for AAPL, MSFT, and NVDA remain visible in the portfolio view and have not been altered or removed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target symbol is AAPL. The dividend amount must be approximately $96.00 (acceptable range: 95.0-97.0) and dated March 2024. The buy transaction must be for approximately 0.55 units (acceptable range: 0.54-0.56) at a price of approximately $174.55 (acceptable range: 173.0-176.0), dated March 2024. The buy transaction comment must contain the keyword 'DRIP' or 'reinvest'.
